subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The heart of the most exalted Paradise hath been consumed with fire by reason of that which hath befallen the Wronged One at the hands of them that have disbelieved in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قد احترق قلب الفردوس الاعلی بما ورد علی المظلوم من الذین کفروا بالله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @exhortations and counsels, @rejection, opposition and persecution
